prose: WP05 extends SS3 (tools/bootstrap_cluster.py) to install the four remaining Helm releases after cilium + kube-vip: sergelogvinov/proxmox-cloud-controller-manager v0.14.0 (providerID + region/zone labels), sergelogvinov/proxmox-csi-plugin chart 0.5.9 (StorageClass proxmox-lvm-thin on lvm-thin pool data1), cert-manager v1.16.1 (in-cluster CA only -- installCRDs=true, NO ACME solvers per NFR-007), and oci://ghcr.io/strrl/charts/cloudflare-tunnel-ingress-controller v0.0.23 (IngressClass cloudflare-tunnel). Demoted Traefik is installed via the Talos HelmChartConfig mechanism (rendered by WP02 into clusters/<name>/manifests/traefik-helmchartconfig.yaml); SS3 applies that file via kubectl. A new host_ports phase verifies M2 (no new DNAT rules added by Helm charts) by diffing the live PVE nft prerouting chain against clusters/<name>/host_ports_baseline.txt; new DNAT rules surface as HostPortsAddedError. The bootstrap_cluster <-> host_ports cycle is broken via an on_ssh_failure callback so lib/host_ports.py stays independent of bootstrap_cluster.py.

files_created.description: Captures the initial PVE nft prerouting chain to clusters/<name>/host_ports_baseline.txt once at WP00 setup. Invoked via ssh -p 6022 to the PVE operator host. Verifies the snapshot contains 'chain prerouting' before accepting.

verify_no_new_dnat_rules(): SSH-based nft check. Detects new dnat-to clauses and raises HostPortsAddedError. Optional on_ssh_failure callable decouples it from bootstrap_cluster's BootstrapError type -- a unit-testable seam.

Seven pytest cases for the WP05 surface: four lock-chart coverage, no-ACME-on-cert-manager, proxmox-ccm carries credentials+region/zone, proxmox-csi declares proxmox-lvm-thin default, host_ports verifier passes on unchanged prerouting, host_ports raises on new DNAT, host_ports surfaces ssh failure via callback.

files_modified.description: _run_helm now installs first_two then remaining_releases then applies the Traefik HelmChartConfig manifest (when present). New _run_host_ports phase. PHASES tuple extended to (talos, k3s, helm, kubeconfig, host_ports). New _load_cluster_secrets() reads required proxmox + cf tokens via SecretLoader and optional CF_TUNNEL_NAME via os.environ.

Adds remaining_releases(cluster, secrets) -> (list[HelmRelease], ManifestApply|None) returning proxmox-ccm, proxmox-csi, cloudflare-tunnel-ingress-controller, cert-manager in installation order. ManifestApply dataclass + apply_manifest() for kubectl apply. first_two_releases unchanged.

test_list_phases_returns_all_five updated to match the 5-phase list. test_bootstrap_full_happy_path now env-stubs PROXMOX_TOKEN_*, CF_API_TOKEN, CF_ACCOUNT_ID so _load_cluster_secrets works under a stubbed subprocess.

Appended WP05 additional_dependencies block (proxmox-ccm 0.14.0, proxmox-csi 0.5.9, strrl/cloudflare-tunnel-ingress-controller 0.0.23, cert-manager v1.16.x) plus a cross_check sub-block (pve_api, lvm-thin, cf_api, k8s compat) and a verifier.no_new_host_ports sub-block.
